title: ctxlint rule catalog
description: Governing schema for the machine-readable rule catalogs that back the ctxlint specifications (context-, mcp-config-, agent-session-lint-rules.json). Defines the shared metadata block + the rule/category shape every catalog must satisfy. Per-catalog extras (formats, clients, agents, dataSources, target) are permitted via additionalProperties.

$schema.description: Points at this governing schema so editors and CI validate against it.

title.description: Optional human title for the catalog.

description.description: Optional human description of the catalog's scope.

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the specification this catalog implements.

specDate.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the spec version was authored/updated.

mcpSpecCompatibility.description: Shared optional field: the Model Context Protocol wire-spec version this catalog tracks (date-stamped, e.g. "2025-11-25"). Present only on catalogs whose rules are bound to the MCP protocol version (mcp-config). Absent (meaningfully) on catalogs that are protocol-agnostic (context, agent-session).

repository.description: Canonical repository URL for the reference implementation.

id.description: Stable rule ID in ctxlint `category/slug` format (a single `/` separator). NOTE: the sibling mcp-compliance project uses `category-suffix` (a `-` separator) instead; the difference is deliberate -- see CONTRIBUTING.md "Rule ID format".
